name: Razorpay Payment Search — Database Query Optimization
scenario: Razorpay's payment search API takes 4.2 seconds for merchant dashboard queries. EXPLAIN ANALYZE shows a sequential scan of 50M rows. Add targeted indexes, optimize JPA queries, and add query metrics.

core.description: V8__payment_search_indexes.sql: CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY for (merchant_id, created_at DESC) and partial index WHERE status='PENDING'. Both with IF NOT EXISTS.
PaymentRepository: findWithMerchant using JOIN FETCH + HINT_READONLY + HINT_FETCH_SIZE. keysetPage with cursor-based WHERE id > :cursor.
QueryMetricsService: Timer 'db.query.duration' wrapping query calls. Counter 'db.query.slow' for queries > 100ms.
@DataJpaTest (3 tests): JOIN FETCH fires 1 query (Statistics assertion), keyset returns ≤ pageSize results, timer records after each timed call. All 3 pass.
README: EXPLAIN ANALYZE output before/after showing Seq Scan → Index Scan improvement.

bonus.description: pg_stat_statements SQL queries: top 10 by mean_exec_time, queries with most shared_blks_read. Document in src/main/resources/sql/slow-query-analysis.sql.
Batch insert: PaymentBatchService.saveBatch() with hibernate.jdbc.batch_size=50. Test: 500 inserts complete in < 2s.
Read replica routing: AbstractRoutingDataSource + @Transactional(readOnly=true) → replica. Test: routing lookup key is REPLICA for readOnly transaction.

ai_policy_explanation: 5 hints. CONCURRENTLY index creation: cannot run inside a transaction; add spring.flyway.mixed=true OR split into separate migration file. Composite index column order: equality columns (merchant_id) before range column (created_at). HINT_READONLY='true': use the string 'true', not boolean. Statistics.getQueryExecutionCount(): returns total query count since last clear() — call clear() in @BeforeEach for isolation. Keyset cursor: WHERE p.id > :cursor ORDER BY p.id ASC — cursor is the last seen ID from the previous page.
